display_name: 团队办公室角色包生产发布晋级门候选
purpose: 把 P11 sandbox 商品化证据包、商品化 go/no-go、上线批准和 Owner 裁定收束成生产发布晋级门，防止候选资产、sandbox 通过或单仓测试被误当作可生产上架、可真实支付、可生产下载或可安装完成。

promotion_gate_checks.required_evidence: owner_authorization record covering target repos, allowed actions, sandbox scope and forbidden production actions
promotion_gate_checks.required_before_production: Owner authorization must be recorded before any cross-repo sandbox evidence can count.

promotion_gate_checks.required_evidence: bundle hash lock evidence linking artifact_manifest, bundle_tree_sha256, upload receipt, download receipt and install receipt
promotion_gate_checks.required_before_production: The promoted production artifact must match the verified P11 sandbox bundle hash.

promotion_gate_checks.required_evidence: user-view GUI screenshot and operation log for role creation, capability Pack reference, team settings replacement, voice picker and VRM picker
promotion_gate_checks.required_before_production: The buyer and publisher visible flows must be proven by GUI evidence, not direct JSON edits.

promotion_gate_checks.required_evidence: cloud upload receipt, marketplace review receipt and sandbox listing receipt referencing the same candidate bundle
promotion_gate_checks.required_before_production: Cloud upload, review and listing draft receipts must be present before production listing can be requested.

promotion_gate_checks.required_evidence: sandbox order receipt, sandbox payment receipt, entitlement grant receipt and entitlement revoke negative receipt
promotion_gate_checks.required_before_production: Sandbox order, payment and entitlement states must be verified before real payment can be enabled.

promotion_gate_checks.required_evidence: signed download receipt, download hash, install hash and artifact hash continuity report
promotion_gate_checks.required_before_production: Signed production downloads require hash continuity from upload through local install.

promotion_gate_checks.required_evidence: tests/p11-commercial-go-live-evidence-package-template.json verified with final_go_live_decision, production_promotion_receipts, owner_go_no_go_decision, all authoritative receipts and independent acceptance signoff
promotion_gate_checks.required_before_production: Real payment, production listing, production signed download and install distribution require the final P11 go-live evidence package to be verified.

promotion_gate_checks.required_evidence: commerce/download-install-access-matrix.json verified with authoritative blocked receipts for unpaid_download, refund_revoked_download, version_unpublished_or_revoked_download_install and artifact_hash_mismatch
promotion_gate_checks.required_before_production: production signed download and install distribution require the access matrix to be verified.

promotion_gate_checks.required_evidence: install receipt, enabled role pack version receipt, secretary role binding receipt and five advisor team binding receipt
promotion_gate_checks.required_before_production: Local install and team setting replacement must be proven before claiming production installability.

promotion_gate_checks.required_evidence: usage/team-office-runtime-usage-candidate.json verified by user-view GUI screenshots, runtime receipt candidate, secretary and five advisor call trace, capability invocation candidate, Owner Gate pending state and blocked receipts for formal task, execution, memory write and send-message attempts
promotion_gate_checks.required_before_production: Real payment, production signed download and production listing require proof that the installed role set works in Team Office runtime after install and binding.

promotion_gate_checks.required_evidence: blocked receipt set for unauthenticated download, missing entitlement, artifact hash mismatch, unauthorized real payment and unauthorized production publish
promotion_gate_checks.required_before_production: All required negative cases must produce blocked receipts before production promotion.

promotion_gate_checks.required_evidence: independent acceptance signoff covering GUI operations, cloud receipts, install receipts, team binding receipts, negative cases and evidence package integrity
promotion_gate_checks.required_before_production: An independent user-view acceptance agent must sign the final evidence package.

promotion_gate_checks.required_evidence: owner_go_no_go decision record explicitly authorizing or rejecting production listing, real payment, signed download and install distribution
promotion_gate_checks.required_before_production: Owner go/no-go must be recorded after all evidence gates pass.

non_completion_clause: 本文件只是生产发布晋级门候选，当前状态明确为 blocked_requires_p11_verified_evidence_and_owner_decision。没有 P11 权威证据包、用户视角 GUI 证据、云端 sandbox 回执、truzhenos 安装 / 团队绑定回执、负例 blocked 回执、独立验收和 Owner go/no-go 裁定前，不得声称角色包可生产上架、可真实支付、可生产下载、可安装或已正常商品化。
